steps.title: Find the plant with the highest average power generation
steps.content: Comparing the values in the “Average power generation (MWh)” column—2,004; 14,126; 196,220; and 10,693—Hiwassee Dam clearly has the highest at 196,220 MWh.

steps.title: Identify the water source for this plant
steps.content: According to the table, Hiwassee Dam is located on the Hiwassee River—making that the water source of the highest-generating plant. The other three choices correspond to plants with lower power generation. That matches choice B — B is correct.
